items.title: Debug the AI API route before you switch models
items.description:
When an AI API call fails, the tempting reaction is to switch models or providers.

items.title: San Francisco's Gravity Is Back: 366 of 477 YC 2026 Startups Are in One City
items.description:
If you could pick only one counterintuitive number from the YC 2026 batches, make it this one: out of 477 real-ish company records, 366 list San Francisco as their location — roughly 77%.

items.title: In the age of AI, the most valuable skill is no longer writing answers — it is asking the right questions.
items.description:
For a long time, education and work rewarded one thing above all else: the ability to produce correct answers.

items.title: What I Learned Building an AI Agent Whose Only Goal Is to Disagree With You
items.description:
We just opened the waitlist for Something, and the part that surprised me most while building it wasn't the multi-agent orchestration — it was how hard it is to make an AI actually disagree.

items.title: translateZ()
